name: node-commander
title: node-commander
summary: Complete solution for Node.js command-line interfaces
description:
Complete solution for Node.js command-line interfaces
Commander is a light-weight, expressive, and powerful command-line framework
for Node.js.
.
Inspired by Ruby's commander, this Node.js module provides command line
option parsing, automated/customizable help texts, command line prompting
password query, and many more features.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-commander because Complete solution for Node.js command-line interfaces.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-commander as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-commander with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-commander --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
